s3.bucket.inventoryconfiguration.CfnAbou: Specifies the inventory configuration for an Amazon S3 bucket. For more information, see [GET Bucket inventory](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/API/RESTBucketGETInventoryConfig.html) in the *Amazon S3 API Reference*.

s3.bucket.inventoryconfiguration.Destina.Description: Contains information about where to publish the inventory results.

s3.bucket.inventoryconfiguration.Enabled.Description: Specifies whether the inventory is enabled or disabled. If set to `True`, an inventory list is generated. If set to `False`, no inventory list is generated.

s3.bucket.inventoryconfiguration.Id.Description: The ID used to identify the inventory configuration.

s3.bucket.inventoryconfiguration.Include.Description: Object versions to include in the inventory list. If set to `All`, the list includes all the object versions, which adds the version-related fields `VersionId`, `IsLatest`, and `DeleteMarker` to the list. If set to `Current`, the list does not contain these version-related fields.

s3.bucket.inventoryconfiguration.Optiona.Description: Contains the optional fields that are included in the inventory results.
s3.bucket.inventoryconfiguration.Optiona.Valid values: Size | LastModifiedDate | StorageClass | ETag | IsMultipartUploaded | ReplicationStatus | EncryptionStatus | ObjectLockRetainUntilDate | ObjectLockMode | ObjectLockLegalHoldStatus | IntelligentTieringAccessTier | BucketKeyStatus

s3.bucket.inventoryconfiguration.Schedul.Description: Specifies the schedule for generating inventory results.
